Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class SignonResponse

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.SignonResponse
public class SignonResponse extends Object
Represents the Sign-On Response (SONRS) aggregate in an OFX file. This contains the status of the sign-on, server date and time, language, and financial institution information. This class is designed for JAXB marshalling and unmarshalling of OFX XML elements.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    String
    dtServer
    The date and time of the server processing the request.
    FinancialInstitution
    fi
    Information about the financial institution.

    Status
    status
    The status of the sign-on request.

  • Field Details

    • status

      public Status status
      The status of the sign-on request. Corresponds to the OFX aggregate <STATUS>.

    • dtServer

      public String dtServer
      The date and time of the server processing the request. Corresponds to the OFX tag <DTSERVER>. Format is typically "YYYYMMDDHHMMSS[.mmm][Timezone]".

    • language

      public String language
      The language used in the response. Corresponds to the OFX tag <LANGUAGE>. (e.g., "ENG")

    • fi

      public FinancialInstitution fi
      Information about the financial institution. Corresponds to the OFX aggregate <FI>.

  • Constructor Details

    • SignonResponse

      public SignonResponse()
